name: Dawn Eau de Parfum
short: A serene floral-amber eau de parfum capturing the soft, hopeful beauty of dawn in 100ml.
description: Dawn is a serene floral-amber eau de parfum that captures the quiet, hopeful beauty of first light. The composition opens with a dewy flash of pear and bergamot, blooms into a heart of peony and rose, and settles into a soft, warm base of amber and musk. Composed at high concentration for a gentle, lasting sillage that stays close to the skin. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier. Designed as a morning ritual — for the person who begins each day with intention.
benefits: Serene floral-amber composition with dewy pear opening
High concentration for intimate, lasting wear
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A beautiful morning scent, especially lovely in spring and summer.

customerReviews.title: Fresh & Long-Lasting
customerReviews.body: honestly, it smells amazing. The mix of fresh sea vibes with a warm, natural touch makes it feel classy without being overpowering. What I like most is that it actually lasts long

customerReviews.title: Pretty good smell
customerReviews.body: Pretty good smell quality is good long lasting and u feel the presence of it elegance,making it an intimate fragrance rather than one that announces itself across the room.

customerReviews.title: Good one.
customerReviews.body: Fragrance is amazing. Affordable price and adorable packaging.

customerReviews.title: amazing
customerReviews.body: The long-lasting formula ensures the scent lingers for hours, making it ideal for both daytime and evening wear.

customerReviews.title: Long lasting fragrance
customerReviews.body: Dawn aps majeste perfume quality very nice. Perfume taste very cool. Also very freshness. Length is too long. Warmth of nature. Use everywhere.
